news.t: IQM and Real Asset Acquisition Corp. Host Inaugural Capital Markets Day for Investors and Analysts
IQM Appoints Barbara Venneman, Vanguard Board Director and Former Global Head of Deloitte Digital, to its Board of Directors
Ways to target – or avoid — Big Tech and megacap stocks via ETFs amid AI frenzy
Nvidia and Microsoft CEOs say industrial companies will benefit most from AI. Here are stocks to put on your watch list.

holdings.infoBox: IQM is an equity ETF with a total of 81 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 6.98%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 5.68%, Sandisk at 4.89%, Celestica at 4.63%, and Broadcom at 4.35%.

overview.description: The Franklin Intelligent Machines ETF (IQM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 3000 index. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of global equity securities of companies that are relevant to intelligent machines. IQM was launched on Feb 25, 2020 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
